guardrails.note: Read-only bridge from search-demand review candidates to SEO/source/publication readiness. It does not edit front matter, mark review, or publish.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before mark:review and stop before publish. Both require explicit human approval.

reviewPackGuardrails.note: Read-only review pack for high-search-demand lanes. It packages manual review work but never edits article files, marks review, or publishes.
reviewPackGuardrails.stopBefore: All commands are manual-only and require explicit human approval.

sourceEvidence.trafficNote: This report evaluates readiness only; it does not claim keyword volume, rankings, impressions, clicks, traffic, or revenue.
